short_description: Kubernetes node pressure causing pod evictions
description: Node memory pressure triggered pod evictions in production API namespace.
business_impact: Enterprise SLA risk increased and customer-facing API availability dropped for high-value tenants.
resolution: Cordon-drained affected nodes, increased reserved capacity and tuned autoscaler thresholds.

description: API p95 latency increased after downstream entitlement service slowed during subscription sync.
business_impact: Enterprise integrations degraded and Customer Success is preparing SLA communication.
resolution: API reliability is monitoring latency while entitlement service capacity is expanded.

short_description: OAuth token exchange fails for SSO tenants
description: SSO tenants with rotated SAML certificates were not synchronized to identity cache.
business_impact: Enterprise administrators could not access tenant configuration, increasing escalation risk.
resolution: Refreshed identity cache, patched certificate sync and validated token exchange.

short_description: Enterprise billing API timeout recurring during metering sync
description: API timeout occurred again when billing metering sync waited on overloaded entitlement data.
business_impact: Enterprise customers experienced delayed billing data and support risk increased for strategic accounts.
resolution: Scaled API dependency capacity and replayed delayed billing API responses after validation.

short_description: API timeout recurring for analytics dashboard requests
description: API timeout occurred again when analytics dashboard requests waited on stale warehouse partitions.
business_impact: Customer-facing dashboards were degraded and enterprise users lost trust in reporting freshness.
resolution: API reliability and analytics engineering are isolating slow dashboard routes and rebuilding partitions.

short_description: Deployment pods evicted again during release pipeline
description: Similar pod eviction issue happened again when CI/CD release workers triggered CPU pressure in production cluster.
business_impact: Engineering delivery slowed and urgent customer fixes could not be promoted safely.
resolution: Moved release workers away from production node pool and added deployment capacity guardrail.

short_description: Tenant routing mismatch detected in background jobs
description: Background job router sent tenant jobs to shared worker pool with insufficient isolation tags.
business_impact: Enterprise confidence risk increased due to tenant-isolation warnings and delayed processing.
resolution: Core platform and security are validating routing evidence before customer communication.

short_description: Alert noise spike after dashboard rule deploy
description: New alert rule generated duplicate notifications for healthy API shards.
business_impact: On-call productivity decreased but customer-facing services remained available.
resolution: Deduplicated alert rule and added peer review for high-cardinality monitors.

short_description: Worker pod pressure recurring from noisy tenant jobs
description: Recurring pod pressure appeared again after a noisy tenant increased shared background workload.
business_impact: SLA risk grew for multiple tenants because shared background processing slowed.
resolution: Applied tenant-specific throttling and expanded shared worker capacity.

short_description: Webhook API retries recurring for enterprise tenants
description: API timeout and webhook delivery delay happened again as retry queues accumulated for enterprise tenants.
business_impact: Customer automation workflows were delayed for integration-heavy enterprise accounts.
resolution: Increased webhook worker concurrency and prioritized enterprise retry queues.

description: Large enterprise directory sync created identity event backlog.
business_impact: Security-sensitive provisioning workflows are delayed for customer lifecycle changes.
resolution: Security engineering is reviewing provisioning delays and audit trail completeness.

short_description: Admin console login loop recurring after feature rollout
description: Login loop happened again after feature flag rollout changed admin console identity callback behavior.
business_impact: Product operations needed manual confirmation and admins experienced delayed console access.
resolution: Updated identity callback adapter and validated admin console login for staged rollout tenants.
